required_skills: Performance Test Planning, Strategy, and Execution
Load, Stress, Spike, and Soak Testing Methodologies
Application Performance Profiling and Bottleneck Analysis
Scripting for Performance Test Simulation in Python or Java
Database Query Performance Tuning and Indexing
preferred_skills: Frontend Web Performance Optimization and Core Web Vitals
Real User Monitoring and Synthetic Monitoring
Profiling JVM, Python Runtime, and Memory Allocation
Cloud-Scale Load Generation and Cost-Aware Testing
responsibilities: Design and execute comprehensive performance test plans covering load, stress, spike, endurance, and breakpoint scenarios to validate system behavior under realistic and extreme traffic conditions
Develop realistic, parameterized load test scripts using k6, JMeter, or Gatling that accurately simulate concurrent user journeys, think times, and production traffic distributions
Integrate performance tests into CI/CD pipelines with automated threshold enforcement that fails builds when P95 latency, error rate, or throughput metrics breach defined SLAs
Profile application CPU, memory, and I/O utilization using async-profiler and flame graphs to pinpoint hotspots in application code, garbage collection, and database access layers
Analyze distributed system performance by correlating APM traces across service boundaries in Datadog or Dynatrace to identify cascading latency contributors and single points of contention
Conduct database performance tuning by analyzing slow query logs, explaining execution plans, and recommending indexing strategies, connection pooling configurations, and query rewrites
Build capacity models by extrapolating performance test results to project infrastructure requirements for projected traffic growth over six and twelve-month horizons
Produce detailed performance engineering reports that quantify bottlenecks, present before-and-after benchmark comparisons, and prescribe prioritized optimization recommendations
Collaborate with backend and infrastructure engineers to validate performance improvements through controlled A/B benchmarking of architectural changes and configuration tuning
Monitor production system performance using Prometheus and Grafana dashboards with alerting rules that detect latency regressions and throughput degradation before users are impacted
